response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and knowledge-sharing, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack across languages, platforms, and infrastructure (DLang, Node, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited evidence of mobile platform expertise despite role focus on mobile ecosystem
Absence of demonstrated experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
